mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{s} AND accid = #{accId}
SELECT user_id FROM app_push_bill WHERE push = 0
SELECT user_id FROM app_push_bill WHERE accid = #{id} AND source = #{type}

SELECT b.video video,c.merchants_name merchantsName,a.deduction,a.create_time FROM app_push_bill as a LEFT JOIN app_accident_record as b ON a.accid = b.id LEFT JOIN app_b_user as c ON a.user_id = c.id WHERE a.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM app_push_bill WHERE accid = #{accId} AND source = #{type}
SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE type = #{type} AND send_id = #{accId} AND source = 1 and url is not null
SELECT * FROM app_push_bill WHERE accid = #{id} AND source = #{type}
